criteria_results.description: Exporting a project generates a `.zip` file containing `project.json`, `document.pdf`, and an `assets/` directory.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useExport.ts:22-75 implements ZIP creation using JSZip, including 'project.json', 'document.pdf' (and optional 'overlay.pdf'), and an 'assets' folder.

criteria_results.description: `project.json` inside the ZIP uses relative paths (e.g., 'assets/image_1.png') for image content instead of Base64.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useExport.ts:25-55 uses a processAsset helper to save Base64 data to the assets folder and return relative paths like 'assets/img_...png' which are then saved in projectData.

criteria_results.description: Importing the generated ZIP file restores the full project state including the PDF and all visual objects.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useImport.ts:31-85 handleZipImport extracts project.json, PDF files, and resolves all 'assets/...' relative paths back into Data URLs before updating the editor state.

criteria_results.description: Importing a folder (directory upload) containing the extracted ZIP content correctly resolves assets.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useImport.ts:87-133 handleDirectoryImport iterates through the FileList, finding project.json and resolving assets by checking webkitRelativePath or filename matches.

criteria_results.description: Legacy `.json` files with embedded Base64 data can still be imported.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useImport.ts:147-155 provides a direct path for .json files. Additionally, the asset resolution logic in ZIP/Directory handlers returns original content if it doesn't start with 'assets/'.

criteria_results.description: The PDF file is automatically loaded into the viewer when a ZIP project is imported.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useImport.ts:77-85 ensures pdfFile and overlayPdfFile are included in the IMPORT_PROJECT payload, which is merged into the global state.

suggestions: Consider adding a visual loading state or toast notification during ZIP generation/extraction for large projects to improve UX.
Verify if pdfCanvasHeight needs to be exported if the PDF is not yet rendered on the receiving side, though Canvas.tsx:96-103 correctly recalculates it on load.
